candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.

Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.
Snow avalanche susceptibility data showing areas that may be exposed to snow avalanche hazard. Useful for spatial overlay with buildings and parcels in hazard analysis.
Soil and flood landslide susceptibility data showing potential runout areas for soil slides and flood-related landslides. Useful for hazard overlay and risk screening.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.

iterations.ai_content: {"query_mode":"multi_db","planned_steps":[{"step":1,"action":"query","database":"kommuner","purpose":"Get Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer (bounding polygon) for spatial filtering"},{"step":2,"action":"query","database":"statistiskrutenett1km","purpose":"Select 1 km grid cells that intersect the Lillestrøm municipality polygon (use municipal geometry from step 1 as literal) and return cell id and geometry"},{"step":3,"action":"query","database":"matrikkeleneiendomskartteig","purpose":"Select parcels (teig) located in Lillestrøm (filter by kommunenummer) with parcel id and geometry (omrade or representasjonspunkt) as GeoJSON"},{"step":4,"action":"query","database":"kvikkleire","purpose":"Select quick-clay hazard polygons (e.g. utlosningomr and/or utlopomr) that intersect Lillestrøm (use municipality geometry or filter by spatial intersection with parcels) and return hazard polygon id and geometry"},{"step":5,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"Spatially join parcels (step 3) with quick-clay polygons (step 4) to identify parcels that intersect quick-clay hazard areas (result = parcels_in_quickclay)"},{"step":6,"action":"spatial_join","database":null,"purpose":"Spatially join parcels_in_quickclay (step 5) with 1 km grid cells (step 2) to assign each parcel to its containing/intersecting grid cell"},{"step":7,"action":"aggregate","database":null,"purpose":"Aggregate the joined results to count number of parcels_in_quickclay per grid cell (group by grid cell id and include cell geometry)"},{"step":8,"action":"sort","database":null,"purpose":"Sort grid cells by parcel count descending"},{"step":9,"action":"limit","database":null,"purpose":"Return the top 5 1 km grid cells with highest counts (include cell id, parcel count, and cell geometry as GeoJSON)"}] }
